seedanceSegments.title: Hook croûte et fil mozzarella
seedanceSegments.description: Macro croûte dorée, cassure, traction mozzarella tiède, léger recul main.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for macro tabletop framing and breadcrumb sparkle. Use @PoseTopDown for correct hand silhouette when forming the split-cheese-pull gesture.

Generate exactly 5 hard-cut shots, total duration 6 seconds, 1080:1920 vertical, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. ASMR food style, no text on screen.

Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only crisp kitchen ASMR tied to each cut.

Mandatory timing:
- 0.0-1.1s: shallow glide across golden fine breadcrumb skin on one arancini; light catches micro peaks.
- 1.1-2.2s: hard cut — tool tip pierces crust; micro crumbs jump; single sharp crack layer.
- 2.2-3.6s: hard cut — sphere pulled into two steaming halves; mozzarella begins stretching.
- 3.6-5.0s: hard cut — emphasize elastic ribbons at peak tension before relax.
- 5.0-6.0s: hard cut — slight pullback showing one held half-ball with blurred stack behind.

Global negatives: no captions, logos, typography, utensils floating, unrealistic cheese physics, humming score, narrator, music bed, flames on induction, extra shots beyond five.

Mandatory audio for mix: brittle crust rasp, airy steam puff, cheesy stretch peel, subdued room tone only between actions.

references.label: KitchenIslandOverhead

seedanceSegments.continuity: Cold open payoff before chronology resumes in following segments.
seedanceSegments.risk: Cheese-pull length may overshoot realism; clamp stretch to 2 beats.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: brittle crumb scrape; sharp crack layer; humid stretch tear

seedanceSegments.title: Fondations risotto
seedanceSegments.description: Parmesan rain, shallot sweat, rice toast, wine deglaze, broth waves.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @InductionCloseup for hob-level pot detail. Use @SaucepanLarge for vessel silhouette and rim reflections. Use @Spatula for sauté and rice-toss gesture anchor.

Generate exactly 5 hard-cut shots, total duration 7 seconds, 1080:1920 vertical, no slow motion, no extra shots. ASMR food, no text.

Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; pan and liquid ASMR only.

Mandatory timing:
- 0.0-1.4s: parmesan snow falling on board; fine gratings stack.
- 1.4-2.6s: hard cut — shallots hit foaming butter; translucent edges appear as they stir.
- 2.6-4.0s: hard cut — dry risotto rice cascades in; toast until glossy with spatula sweeps.
- 4.0-5.4s: hard cut — white wine ribbon pour; quick steam bloom.
- 5.4-7.0s: hard cut — hot broth ladle spiral; lazy viscous wave across grains.

Global negatives: no captions, no music, no recipe text overlay, no visible appliance brand UI, no floating tools, no second pair of hands, no flame.

Mandatory audio: metal rasp of grater, butter sizzle, dry rice scatter, wine hiss, broth pour splash.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Picks up kitchen timeline after cold hook.
seedanceSegments.risk: Thermomix bowl differs from saucepan; negatives avoid wrong appliance markings.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: grater rasp; butter foam; grain scatter; wine steam; broth pour

seedanceSegments.title: Crème riz verts et repos
seedanceSegments.description: Starchy swirl, parsley and peas parachute, parmesan fold, cool spread.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @InductionCloseup for pot interior cream detail. Use @Spatula for fold and trail gesture. Use @KitchenIslandWide for platter transfer context shot.

Recipe-specific visuals: cooled risotto dense enough to scoop into a ball; peas stay bright emerald; parmesan partially melts into silk streaks — if geometry drifts, treat stills generated under gpt_image_2 production default as supplementary plate references (not counted here).

Generate exactly 5 hard-cut shots, total duration 6 seconds, 1080:1920 vertical.

Integrated audio: no speech, voiceover, or music; wet starch and airy herb sounds only.

Mandatory timing:
- 0.0-1.2s: spatula drags trough; creamy starchy slump closes lazily.
- 1.2-2.2s: hard cut — parsley snowfall on pale cream base.
- 2.2-3.5s: hard cut — peas tumble and rebound; glossy skins read as spheres.
- 3.5-4.8s: hard cut — parmesan ribbons fold until partially absorbed.
- 4.8-6.0s: hard cut — transfer to shallow dish spread for cooling; steam thins implied via edit.

Global negatives: no text, neon greens, pea mush without shape, cheesy soup viscosity, humming music.

Mandatory audio: starchy scrape; dry herb flutter; pea click; cheesy fold slap; platter set thud-soft.

seedanceSegments.title: Farcissage mozzarella
seedanceSegments.description: Portion sphere, mozzarella nest, sealing rotations, tray lineup.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for palms-down forming shots. Use @PoseTopDown for believable Licorn-hand topology from above.

Generate exactly 4 hard-cut shots, total duration 5 seconds, vertical 1080:1920, hard cuts only.

Integrated audio: no speech, voiceover, music — soft tactile hand audio.

Mandatory timing:
- 0.0-1.2s: portion rolled between slightly damp palms; glossy rice mass.
- 1.2-2.4s: hard cut — thumb punches neat well.
- 2.4-3.6s: hard cut — mozzarella cube seated; dewy cube highlight visible.
- 3.6-5.0s: hard cut — rotate-seal smoothing; lineup of sealed spheres on tray edge.

Global negatives: air pocket blowouts, hovering cheese, CGI shine, captions, utensils without hands.

Mandatory audio: soft palm friction, thumb pop, mozzarella land thud-mini, rotational rub.

seedanceSegments.title: Panure double
seedanceSegments.description: Flour veil, egg cling, breadcrumb crests repeated for shag coat.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for dredging station choreography. Use @Sieve optional only as stray crumb controller if needed visually.

Generate exactly 5 hard-cut shots, total duration 6 seconds, vertical, hard cuts, no overlays.

Integrated audio: ASMR dredge chorus; forbidden music or speech.

Mandatory timing:
- 0.0-1.1s: flour dusting with finger taps shedding excess matte coat.
- 1.1-2.3s: hard cut — egg bath dip; viscous sheets fall back into bowl.
- 2.3-3.5s: hard cut — first breadcrumb press; shaggy spikes form.
- 3.5-4.5s: hard cut — second egg dip shorter drip.
- 4.5-6.0s: hard cut — second breadcrumb pack; rack lineup with escaping crumbs.

Global negatives: pristine smooth breading, uniform sandpaper texture, missing double pass, text.

Mandatory audio: powder pat, egg glug, dry crumb crush, second drip, rack tick.

seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: powder taps; slime drip; crumb crunch; drip repeat

seedanceSegments.title: Friture 180–190 °C
seedanceSegments.description: Hot oil sheath, riot bubbles, flip, drain, blot.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @InductionWide for pot-on-hob tableau with believable metallic pot. Use @SaucepanLarge for fry pot scale and rim highlight. Use @Spoon OR metal spider implied by prompt geometry only if visible — prefer describing mesh lift without naming nonexistent asset paths.

Strict negatives: induction cooktop shows no naked flame.

Generate exactly 5 hard-cut shots, total duration 7 seconds, 1080:1920.

Integrated audio: dominant fry hiss; forbidden music or chatter.

Mandatory timing:
- 0.0-1.2s: shimmering oil surface with heat haze cues.
- 1.2-3.2s: hard cut — arancini vertical entry; furious bubble halo.
- 3.2-4.8s: hard cut — batch fry rolling boil sound; spheres rotate subtly.
- 4.8-6.0s: hard cut — spider lift; oil necklaces drip.
- 6.0-7.0s: hard cut — paper towel blot contact; stray steam ribbons.

Global negatives: undercooked pallid shell, exploding cheese geysers, grease fire flame, captions.

Mandatory audio: low oil hum pre-drop; explosive sizzle; steady fry roar; lift drip percussion; blot hiss fade.

seedanceSegments.title: Plat rustic et satisfaction Licorn
seedanceSegments.description: Stacked spheres, sprouts salad bowl, Licorn tableau, decisive cut, expressive satisfaction.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for brown ceramic mound and sprouts bowl matching cookbook photo cues. Use @CharacterSheet plus @PoseThreeQuarterRight plus @CharacterExpressions neutral-to-pleased for final satisfaction beat framing Licorn visibly content near finished platter.

Generate exactly 5 hard-cut shots, total duration 6 seconds, vertical 1080:1920, hard cuts.

Integrated audio: no speech, voiceover, music — crisp culinary micro sounds and soft exhale permissible on final portrait.

Mandatory timing:
- 0.0-1.2s: mound of spheres on earthy plate; lustrous crumbs read hot.
- 1.2-2.4s: hard cut — small bowl young leaves glistening lightly dressed.
- 2.4-3.8s: hard cut — mid Licorn plating scene with platter foreground sharp.
- 3.8-5.4s: hard cut — knife crosses single sphere; audible crust crunch into molten mozzarella.
- 5.4-6.0s: hard cut — Licorn expressive pleased micro-smile synced to steam wisp.

Global negatives: cold cheese no stretch when cut, cluttered props, captions, unrealistic plate scale.

Mandatory audio: soft ceramic clink, leaf shuffle, decisive crust saw, airy satisfaction exhale-soft.
